summary: Fast forward to live stream live point
description:
GIVEN a user is playing a live stream
AND the playhead is not at the live point

steps.action:
WHEN a user initiates Fast forward
AND the user does not stop fast forward
steps.result:
THEN the playhead fast forwards to the live point
AND once the playhead reaches the live point, fast forward stops automatically
AND once fast forward stops, the stream starts playing from the live point
